# This test explores uneven region sizes with per-region constraints. Region a
# has 3 nodes and region b has 5 nodes, with identical per-node CPU capacity.
# The load is proportional to the number of nodes per region so that absolute
# CPU balancing should still yield even CPU utilization across all stores.
gen_cluster nodes=8 region=(a,b) nodes_per_region=(3,5) node_cpu_cores=8
----

setting split_queue_enabled=false
----

gen_ranges ranges=30 min_key=0 max_key=5000 placement_type=replica_placement
{s1,s2,s3}:30
----
{s1:*,s2,s3}:30

gen_ranges ranges=50 min_key=5000 max_key=10000 placement_type=replica_placement
{s4,s5,s6}:20
{s6,s7,s8}:15
{s4,s7,s8}:15
----
{s4:*,s5,s6}:20
{s6:*,s7,s8}:15
{s4:*,s7,s8}:15

set_span_config
[0,5000): num_replicas=3 num_voters=3 constraints={'+region=a':3} lease_preferences=[['+region=a']]
[5000,10000): num_replicas=3 num_voters=3 constraints={'+region=b':3} lease_preferences=[['+region=b']]
----

gen_load rate=3000 rw_ratio=0.95 min_block=128 max_block=128 request_cpu_per_access=1000000 raft_cpu_per_write=200000 min_key=0 max_key=5000
----
3.00 access-vcpus, 0.03 raft-vcpus, 19 KiB/s goodput

gen_load rate=5000 rw_ratio=0.95 min_block=128 max_block=128 request_cpu_per_access=1000000 raft_cpu_per_write=200000 min_key=5000 max_key=10000
----
5.00 access-vcpus, 0.05 raft-vcpus, 31 KiB/s goodput

assertion type=conformance violating=0
----

assertion type=balance stat=cpu upper_bound=1.15 ticks=6
----
asserting: max_{stores}(cpu)/mean_{stores}(cpu) ≤ 1.15 at each of last 6 ticks

eval duration=8m samples=1 seed=42 cfgs=(mma-count) metrics=(cpu,cpu_util,replicas,leases)
----
